# Dr. Kavya's Hair & Skin Care

> Handcrafted herbal hair masks, face packs, and oils made by mom. 100% natural, chemical-free, made in India. Freemium-scalable storefront with admin CRUD.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand story and featured herbal products.
- [Shop](/shop): Full catalog of hair and skin care products.
- [Search](/search): Search products by name or concern.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Hair & skin concern quiz with product recommendations.
- [Track Order](/track): Guest order tracking by order ID and email.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions on shipping, usage, and ingredients.
- [Story](/story): Founder story behind Dr. Kavya's Hair & Skin Care.
- [Ingredients](/ingredients): Herbs and natural ingredients we use.
- [Journal](/journal): Articles on hair and skin care.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach out for support or wholesale inquiries.
- [Cart](/cart): Review items before checkout.
- [Checkout](/checkout): Secure Razorpay checkout (flat ₹79 shipping).
- [Account](/account): Customer account and order history.
- [Sign In](/auth): Sign in or create an account.

## Products

- Herbal Hair Mask (100g / 200g): Hair fall and conditioning.
- Hair Fall Control: Severe hair fall and regrowth.
- Anti-Dandruff Mask: Dandruff and itchy scalp.
- Fresh Bhringraj Oil: Premature greying.
- Multi-Action Face Pack: Detan, pigmentation, acne, glow.
- Detan Face Pack: Sun tan and dullness.
- Herbal Bath Powder (Nalugu Pindi): Body glow, soap-free wash.
- Hair + Skin Starter Combo: First-order favourite.
